transcription.text: with just one wish if i could change my whole world around i'd bring an autumn day inside or summer all year long if i could speak in color what magic i'd reveal is this what peaceful looks like do you know how colors feel say hello where to go whatever you want to know ask how ask now ask sherwin-williams
